data.Modification: Iodoacetamide derivative/Addition of Glycine/Addition of G
Ammonia quenched monolink of BuUrBu crosslinker

project.title: PlxnA2 interactome in primary hippocampal murine neurons
project.projectDescription: Proper assembly of complex neural circuits requires the coordinated action of a  limited set of axon guidance molecules, including plexins. To probe the extracellular vicinity of PlxnA2 in primary hippocampal neurons, we used in this work antibody directed proximity biotinylation and identified candidate co-receptors.
project.sampleProcessingProtocol: Protein digestion was performed on-beads. Sample-incubated streptavidin magnetic beads were treated with 10 mM TCEP in 20 mM TEAB, and alkylation followed with 15 mM iodoacetamide, followed by overnight treatment with trypsin, peptide recovery and desalting using a C18 Zip tip for mass spectrometry analysis
project.dataProcessingProtocol: Data were searched against the mouse subsets of the UniProtKB database (UniProtKB.2017.11.01.) (plus the corresponding randomized sequences to calculate FRD on the searches), using Protein Prospector. 1% FDR was allowed.

references.referenceLine: Zhao XF, Kohen R, Van Battum EY, Niu X, Zeng Y, Zhang X, Johnson CN, Wang K, Verhagen MG, Lim BC, Oses-Prieto JA, Rasband JM, Burlingame AL, Cai D, Pasterkamp RJ, Rasband MN, Giger RJ. Diverse and location-specific roles of PlexinA2, PlexinA4, and NCAM in developing hippocampal mossy fibers. Transl Psychiatry. 2026 16(1):126
